enchantment.customenchants.harvesting.de: Bonus crop drops. Higher levels increase yield.
enchantment.customenchants.smelting_touc: Auto-smelts drops. Exclusive with Silk Touch.
enchantment.customenchants.fortune.desc: More block drops. Replaces vanilla Fortune.
enchantment.customenchants.efficiency.de: Levels VI-VII: combine two Eff V items in an anvil.
enchantment.customenchants.unbreakable.d: Item never breaks. Exclusive with Unbreaking.
